title: Fragrant Sweet German Beet Soup
description: A floral, dense yet light soup featuring sweet molasses and a subtle apple cider vinegar note, perfect for a nut‑free, vegetarian dinner.
instructions: Heat a large pot over medium. Add onions and garlic, sauté until translucent.
Add diced beets and carrots, cook for 5 minutes, stirring.
Pour in vegetable stock and add bay leaves; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, simmer uncovered for 25–30 minutes until vegetables are tender.
Remove bay leaves. Stir in molasses and apple cider vinegar. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Use an immersion blender or transfer to a blender to puree until smooth; return to pot.
Adjust seasoning; if soup is too thick, add a splash of water or more stock.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with a drizzle of milk or a dollop of crème fraîche (optional).
